response.justification: While Bogdan possesses strong foundational engineering skills, extensive experience in backend/distributed systems, and recent exposure to agentic AI infrastructure, his resume does not demonstrate the executive leadership experience, a track record of scaling engineering teams (10 to 30+), or the deep architectural ownership for AI systems in regulated fintech environments that are critical for a CTO role. His experience is primarily at a Senior/Staff Engineer level.
strengths: Extensive experience (15+ years) in backend and distributed systems.
Recent hands-on contribution to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling.
Strong emphasis on software craftsmanship and quality practices.
concerns: Significant lack of demonstrated executive leadership and experience scaling engineering teams (10 to 30+ people).
Limited explicit experience architecting and operating AI systems in regulated financial environments.
Absence of strategic architectural ownership for complex multi-agent AI frameworks and fintech integrations.
